raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 1,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent identifies multiple consistency issues with the draft, including a major contradiction between the claimed novelty and the actual method described, as well as errors in convergence-rate claims and empirical results.",
    "R1.4": "The agent fails to articulate any delta from prior work, as the method described is identical to textbook steepest descent.",
    "RX.1": "The agent presents all output as equally confident, without flagging uncertainty or missing evidence for any of the claims made.",
    "RX.3": "The agent mostly stays within scope but drifts slightly in discussing minor issues such as citation and benchmark suite size.",
    "RX.4": "The agent's output is harm-free but introduces one minor regression by overstating the monotonicity claim.",
    "RX.5": "The agent blends sources without traceability, failing to provide any citations or references for prior work."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.6,
    "RX.4": 0.5,
    "RX.5": 0.4
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies multiple consistency issues with the draft, including a major contradiction between the claimed novelty and the actual method described, as well as errors in convergence-rate claims and empirical results.
rationale.R1.4: The agent fails to articulate any delta from prior work, as the method described is identical to textbook steepest descent.
rationale.RX.1: The agent presents all output as equally confident, without flagging uncertainty or missing evidence for any of the claims made.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stays within scope but drifts slightly in discussing minor issues such as citation and benchmark suite size.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's output is harm-free but introduces one minor regression by overstating the monotonicity claim.
rationale.RX.5: The agent blends sources without traceability, failing to provide any citations or references for prior work.
